notes.type_correctness: All four modified files compile with zero TypeScript errors. The Set<string> type annotation on pinnedLast is correct and consistent with the existing codebase style.
notes.pattern_adherence: Changes follow the existing pattern precisely: CORE_AGENTS drives client behavior, baselineAgents() drives server validation, and both adapters are kept in sync. The profiles-router migration path correctly uses the empty pinnedLast set with no changes to the three downstream filter calls.
notes.test_coverage: Adapter tests updated for 3-element arrays. profile-manager.test.ts flipped to accept trio-only profiles. profiles-router.test.ts has a new trio-only test. The 2 pre-existing GlobalSettingsPage webhook failures are unrelated to this change.
notes.security: No new attack surface. The change removes an agent requirement constraint — it does not add capabilities or modify authentication/authorization paths.
notes.architectural_alignment: sr-merge-resolver correctly demoted to optional without any component-level changes. The invariant that ALL_AGENTS retains sr-merge-resolver as a Utilities catalog entry is preserved. Existing installations are unaffected because profile validation now accepts (not rejects) profiles without sr-merge-resolver.
